title: Marcus's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Baby Marcus discovers the gentle sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family, from soft footsteps to sizzling pancakes.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up. Soft, soft footsteps. Mama walks by. Tip-toe, tip-toe.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, sitting up in his crib in cozy pajamas. Golden Sunday morning light streams through the window as his mother tiptoes past in soft slippers.
illustration.alt: Marcus waking up in his crib as mama walks by quietly

pages.text: Papa yawns. Big, big yawn! Ahhhhh! Marcus giggles.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, laughing in his highchair as Papa stretches and yawns widely in the warm sunlit kitchen wearing comfortable pajamas.
illustration.alt: Papa yawning while Marcus giggles in his highchair

pages.text: Pancakes go sizzle! Pop, pop, pop! Yummy sounds in the kitchen.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, clapping his hands excitedly as pancakes sizzle and pop in the pan. Golden morning light fills the kitchen where family members cook in their cozy pajamas.
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping as pancakes sizzle in the kitchen

pages.text: Newspaper crinkles. Rustle, rustle. Coffee bubbles. Glub, glub, glub.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, reaching toward the crinkling newspaper while sitting on Papa's lap. Steam rises from coffee cups in the gentle Sunday morning light.
illustration.alt: Marcus reaching for the newspaper while Papa reads

pages.text: Marcus claps his hands. Clap, clap, clap! Happy Sunday morning sounds!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, clapping happily at the breakfast table surrounded by his loving family in their pajamas, with golden sunlight streaming through windows and newspapers and pancakes on the table.
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping happily with his family at breakfast

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes go sizzle and pop in the pan!

questions.question: How does Mama walk?
questions.explanation: Mama walks softly with tip-toe steps in the morning.

questions.question: What does Marcus do at the end?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands happily at all the morning sounds!
